title: Arizona Gunfighter
writer: Harry F. Olmsted, George H. Plympton
actors: Bob Steele, Jean Carmen, Ted Adams
plot: When Colt kills the men that murdered his father, he escapes his pursuers and joins Wolf and his outlaw gang. After two years Wolf breaks up the gang, deeds his ranch to Colt, and turns himself in. Now an honest rancher, things ar...
